arts.sum: As Hansi Flick explained during the press conference earlier in the day, everyone is ready and prepared for a major challenge – to win the season's second El Clásico and return home with the trophy. Hansi Flick has his heart set on winning his first major trophy as FC Barcelona manager, but he knows that what stands between him and the Spanish Super Cup title is one of the most formidable opponents in world football.

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Catalan giants 'want goalscoring machine' as long-term Robert Lewandowski replacement

arts.sum: Ronald Araujo appears destined to leave Barcelona this month, having attracted strong interest from Juventus.
